title: St. Lawrence River Freshwater Ecosystem Initiative - Canada.ca
content:
## Water: Saint Lawrence

## St. Lawrence River Freshwater Ecosystem Initiative
Priorities, partnerships, programs and actions for protecting the waters of St. Lawrence River through a Freshwater Action Plan.
- On World Water Day, the Government of Canada announces funding for new community projects to protect fresh water
- Adoption of 2021–2026 programming for the 2011–2026 Canada Quebec Agreement on the St. Lawrence

## Services and information
State of the waters, agreements, funding, taking action, reports and publications.
Working with others to conserve, restore, protect and enhance the St. Lawrence River

### State of the St. Lawrence River
Challenges affecting the St. Lawrence River

### Taking action to protect the St. Lawrence River
Measures for the protection of the St. Lawrence River.
Details on funding opportunities and how to apply.
Projects funded under the Community Interaction Program.
Reports, publications and monitoring sheets.
Studies related to the St. Lawrence River Freshwater Ecosystem Initiative.
